content: ECS task scale-in protection: task sets protectionEnabled=true via the ECS agent endpoint $ECS_AGENT_URI/task-protection/v1/state (PUT, from inside the task) or UpdateTaskProtection API; protected tasks are not terminated by service autoscaling scale-in or deployments. Default expiry 2h; expiresInMinutes configurable 1–2880. Canonical use case is long-lived WebSocket/game/chat sessions: protect on session start, unprotect (or let expire) when sessions end. Task role needs ecs:UpdateTaskProtection. Deployments wait for protection to clear, so cap expiry sensibly.
